data.text: having infinite awareness, understanding, and insight
examples: a novel with an omniscient narrator =a narrator who knows what all the characters are doing and thinking
the narrator seems an omniscient person who tells us about the characters and their relations

data.text: possessed of universal or complete knowledge
examples: a novel with an omniscient narrator =a narrator who knows what all the characters are doing and thinking
the narrator seems an omniscient person who tells us about the characters and their relations

enrichment.etymology: New Latin omniscient-, omnisciens, back-formation from Medieval Latin omniscientia
